step_rationale: Endothelial activation marker; reflects endothelial dysfunction post-PCI.
mechanism: ESAM is an endothelial-cell adhesion molecule marking activation and integrity loss after coronary intervention.

references.title: Analysis of biomarkers for risk of acute kidney injury after primary angioplasty for acute ST-segment elevation myocardial infarction: results of the HORIZONS-AMI trial.
references.journal: Catheterization and cardiovascular interventions : official journal of the Society for Cardiac Angiography & Interventions
